# Abigail Builds Portfolio Website

This is a professional portfolio website with a modern, minimal design.

## Design Guidelines
- Clean, minimal aesthetic with lots of breathing room
- Professional typography (use modern sans-serif fonts)
- Subtle animations and smooth transitions
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Accessibility-focused (semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation)

## Color Scheme
- Primary: Deep Teal — #0F5F5C
- Secondary: Tech Mint — #b3e2da
- Accent: Apricot Pro — #d97c32
- Highlight: Off-White — #FAF9F6
- Professional and trustworthy palette
- High contrast for readability

## Sections
1. Hero - Full-width with headline, subheadline, and CTAs
2. Trust Strip - Previous companies/credentials
3. Services - 4-column grid of offerings
4. Why Work With Me - Two-column layout
5. Featured Projects - Card-based grid
6. How I Work - Process steps
7. Tech Stack - Icon row
8. Testimonials - Clean quotes
9. Final CTA - Strong, centered call-to-action
10. Footer - Minimal navigation and contact info
